name: Chocolate Krispy Drops
recipeInstructions:
-------------
1. Melt the white almond bark and chocolate chips together in a 200°F oven.
2. Stir until well blended.
3. Mix in the Rice Krispies and dry roasted peanuts, thoroughly.
4. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto parchment paper or a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Allow to cool completely before storing in candy tins.
May add up to 1 cup additional peanuts if desired.
